diagrams.title: Basic Agent Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the fundamental relationship between agent, environment, sensors, and actuators
diagrams.purpose: Understand how agents interact with their environment through sensing and acting

diagrams.title: Agent Function and Program
diagrams.description: Illustrates the mapping from percepts to actions through function and program
diagrams.purpose: Clarify the difference between abstract agent function and its implementation

diagrams.title: Taxonomy of Agent Types
diagrams.description: Hierarchical progression from simple to complex agent types
elements: Arrows showing progression with added capabilities
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how each agent type builds upon and improves previous types

diagrams.title: Learning Agent Architecture
diagrams.description: Internal components of a learning agent showing feedback loops
diagrams.purpose: Understand how learning agents improve over time through feedback mechanisms

diagrams.title: PEAS Framework Table
diagrams.description: Comparative table of PEAS for different agent examples
elements: Columns: Agent Type, Performance, Environment, Actuators, Sensors
Rows: Medical diagnosis, Vacuum cleaner, Autonomous vehicle, Chess player
diagrams.purpose: Apply PEAS framework to analyze different agent specifications

visuals.title: The Structure Of Agents
visuals.description: Visual diagram for the structure of agents
